conventions.cache_note: Server-side KV cache. Cache hits billed at input_cache_hit price; misses at input price.
conventions.batch_note: Batch API (async) offers 50% discount on input, cache hit, and output.
conventions.deprecation_note: deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner are deprecated aliases for deepseek-v4-flash (non-thinking and thinking modes). Their old independent pricing ($0.27/$2.19) is superseded.
conventions.v4_pro_discount_note: deepseek-v4-pro is at 75% off (standard tier) until 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z. After the promotion ends, the API price is officially set to 1/4 of the original launch price (numerically identical to the promotion price). Undiscounted tier reflects this post-promotion official price.
conventions.cache_hit_reduction_note: Effective 2026-04-26T12:15Z, input_cache_hit price for all models is set to 1/10 of the pre-reduction launch cache-hit price.

deepseek-chat.deprecation_note: Corresponds to deepseek-v4-flash non-thinking mode. Will be removed in future.

deepseek-reasoner.deprecation_note: Corresponds to deepseek-v4-flash thinking mode. Will be removed in future.

deepseek-v4-pro#standard#input.note: 75% off promotion until 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z; post-promotion official price $0.435 (1/4 of launch $1.74)

deepseek-v4-pro#standard#input_cache_hit.note: 75% off promotion until 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z; cache_hit reduced to 1/10 of launch price effective 2026-04-26T12:15Z; post-promotion official price $0.003625

deepseek-v4-pro#standard#output.note: 75% off promotion until 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z; post-promotion official price $0.87 (1/4 of launch $3.48)

deepseek-v4-pro#undiscounted#input.note: Official price after 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z; = 1/4 of launch price $1.74. Numerically identical to promotion price.

deepseek-v4-pro#undiscounted#input_cache.note: Official price after 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z; = 1/4 of post-April-26 cache_hit price $0.0145. Numerically identical to promotion price.

deepseek-v4-pro#undiscounted#output.note: Official price after 2026-05-31T15:59:00Z; = 1/4 of launch price $3.48. Numerically identical to promotion price.
